is_server.title: Run as server
is_server.description: True: this machine hosts the syslog receiver and MCP server. False: connect to a remote syslog-mcp server.

use_docker.title: Deploy with Docker
use_docker.description: True: run via docker compose. False: install as a systemd user service. Only used in server mode.

server_url.title: Server URL
server_url.description: MCP server base URL. Server mode: leave as default. Client mode: set to remote host (e.g. http://squirts:3100).

api_token.title: API token
api_token.description: Bearer token for MCP authentication. Server mode: the server will require this token. Client mode: token provided by the server admin.

syslog_host.title: Syslog bind host
syslog_host.description: Network interface to bind the syslog listener to. Only used in server mode.

syslog_port.title: Syslog port
syslog_port.description: UDP/TCP port for syslog ingestion. Only used in server mode.

mcp_host.title: MCP bind host
mcp_host.description: Network interface to bind the MCP HTTP server to. Only used in server mode.

mcp_port.title: MCP HTTP port
mcp_port.description: Port for the MCP HTTP server. Only used in server mode.

max_db_size_mb.title: Max database size (MB)
max_db_size_mb.description: Logical DB size cap. Oldest logs are deleted when exceeded. 0 = disabled. Only used in server mode.

data_dir.title: Data directory
data_dir.description: Directory for the SQLite database. Defaults to the plugin's persistent data directory. Only used in server mode.

retention_days.title: Log retention (days)
retention_days.description: How many days to keep logs. 0 = keep forever. Only used in server mode.

docker_ingest_enabled.title: Enable Docker log ingestion
docker_ingest_enabled.description: Pull container logs from remote docker-socket-proxy endpoints. Only used in server mode.

fleet_hosts.title: Fleet hosts
fleet_hosts.description: SSH config aliases for hosts in your fleet — used for Docker ingest (when enabled, each becomes http://<alias>:2375) and for the /deploy-dropins command that pushes rsyslog drop-in configs.
